description: Small BEO mode registry. Profiles summarize authoring and validation requirements; concrete enforcement lives in ticket and approval helpers. protected_path_defaults apply to TICKET.json product scope, not authorized BEO control-plane artifact writes.

quick.summary: Repo-only low-risk work with explicit file scope and at least one verification command.

fast_track.summary: Opt-in flag to bypass review when all verifications pass. Only allowed for quick mode with explicit (non-glob) file scope.

standard.summary: Quick requirements plus an explicit risk summary and rollback plan.

strict.summary: Standard requirements plus resolved human gates, side-effect contracts, and a current actor-matching BEO reservation covering approved files and generated outputs.

worktree_isolation.summary: Optional flag to create an isolated git worktree for strict-mode execution. All mutations happen inside the worktree. On review accept, the worktree branch is merged; on other routes, the worktree is cleaned up without merging.
